word_of_the_day.meaning: The responsibility to care for what has been entrusted to us.
word_of_the_day.reflection_hi: संरक्षण-भाव अधिकार से अधिक उत्तरदायित्व को महत्व देता है।

first_light.title: First Light
first_light.subtitle: A calm opening signal for today’s reading surface.

signals.label: Read with attention
signals.text: Begin with one serious read before scanning the rest of the day.

signals.label: Preserve useful insight
signals.text: Save one idea that may remain useful beyond today.

signals.label: Return with reflection
signals.text: Close the session by asking what changed in your understanding.
